faq.title: Everything you need to know about partnering with us
faq.description: Find answers to the most common questions about becoming a chauffeur partner with Airport Transfer. From requirements and payments to operations and support, we've got you covered.

q1.question: Who can become a partner?
q1.answer: Any licensed chauffeur or transport company operating in Pakistan with valid NTN registration.

q2.question: What are the requirements?
q2.answer: Valid driver's license, registered commercial vehicle, Airport Transfer permit, and professional appearance and service quality.

q3.question: How do I get paid?
q3.answer: Payments are processed securely and transferred directly to your Pakistani bank account.

q4.question: Can I choose my rides?
q4.answer: Yes, you have full control to accept or decline requests.

q5.question: Which cities do you operate in?
q5.answer: We currently operate across major cities in Pakistan including Karachi, Lahore, Islamabad, Faisalabad, Multan, and Peshawar.

cta.title: Still have questions?
cta.description: Our team is ready to help you with any questions you may have.
